title: Trainer / Lecturer - IT & Digital Skills (Institute Higher Learning)
description:
Stag Match® Institute is a forward-thinking educational provider in Singapore, committed to equipping adult learners with in-demand skills through high-quality, industry-relevant programs. We deliver a wide range of courses aligned with the needs of today's workforce and the evolving digital landscape.

Position Overview:

We are seeking dedicated and experienced Trainers/Lecturers (Full-Time or Adjunct) to join our team and deliver training within our Institute of Higher Learning (IHL)-level programs. You will facilitate engaging, practice-oriented sessions in a variety of IT domains for adult learners, supporting their upskilling, reskilling, and career advancement goals.

Key Responsibilities:

Design and deliver structured training sessions in IT disciplines such as:

UX/UI Design
Product Management
Full-Stack Development
Data Analytics
Cloud Computing
New Media & Digital Marketing
AI Agentic
Ai Generalist

Develop and maintain course materials, including lesson plans, slide decks, assessments, and practical projects.

Conduct learner assessments, provide constructive feedback, and support learning outcomes.

Facilitate an interactive and inclusive adult learning environment, both in theory and application.

Stay updated on current industry practices, tools, and technologies to ensure training content remains relevant and industry-aligned.

Collaborate with program coordinators and internal teams to ensure training delivery excellence and learner satisfaction.

Engage with stakeholders to align course content with industry and workforce development needs.

Participate in course evaluation and continuous improvement processes.

Requirements:

Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Digital Marketing, or a related field.

Minimum 2 years of experience in adult training, education, or professional development, preferably within IHL or CET contexts.

Solid industry knowledge and hands-on experience in one or more IT subject areas listed above.

Strong facilitation, presentation, and classroom management skills.

Familiarity with adult learning principles, online/blended learning tools, and outcome-based education methodologies.

Ability to work independently and collaboratively with a cross-functional team.

Willingness to commit a minimum of 10 working days over the course duration.

Job Types: Full-time, Part-time, Permanent, Contract, Freelance

postedCompany.description:
Incorporated in 2015, Stag Match Institute (SMI) a member of SMET Group. Offering a comprehensive range of Courses (WSQ & Non-WSQ) to working professionals (individuals or companies), Our courses were designed & crafted by our experienced certified trainers that aims to impart the most updated industry-relevant knowledge to our trainees.

Leveraging on SMET Group‘s successful formula in the education industry (Stag Match Education and Training Group since 2001), Stag Match Institute is poised to expand in the adult learning segment with the group’s support with its extensive resources, excellent & proven track records in the education industry in Singapore.

Stag Match Pte Ltd is a WSQ Training Provider approved by SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG).
postedCompany.name: STAG MATCH INSTITUTE PRIVATE LIMITED
